verses.text: Topa in Moses kiangah
“Israel mite tungah hih bangin gen in: Numei ahi a, pasal ahi zongin, Topa-a' dingin amahmah a kituam koihna dingin Nazir kiciamna ahi, a tuam mahmah kiciamna a bawl ciangin
leenggahzu leh khamtheihzu nelo ding hi. Leenggahzu leh khamtheihzu pan a kibawl tuithuk dawnlo ding a, leenggahtui khat peuhpeuh dawnloin, leenggah a hing hita leh a keu hita leh nelo ding hi
Amah a kituam koih hun sungteng leenggui panin a piang bangmah nelo ding a, a tang ahi a, a hawng nangawn ahi zongin nelo ding hi
“Tuam om dingin a kiciam hun sungteng ama lu tungah mulkiatna ki-tahlo ding hi. Topa-a' dingin a tuam om hun a cin' mateng amah a siangtho hi ding a, a sam a sau-in khawi ding hi
Topa-a' dingin a tuam om hun sungteng mi siluang kiangah pailo ding hi
A nu, a pa, a sanggamnu, a sanggampa ahi zongin a sih leh tuate khat peuhpeuh hangin amah kininsaklo ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian-a' dingin a tuam omna ama lu tungah om hi
A tuam om hun sungteng Topa-a' dingin a siangtho ahi hi
“Mi khatpeuh ama gei-ah thakhatin si-in, amah in a ki-ap ama sam a nitsak leh, ni sagih sung ngakin tua ciangin kisian'suahin a sam met ding hi
A ni giat ni-in amah in siampipa kiang kikhopna bukkongah vakhu nih ahih kei leh kawl vakhuno nih paipih ding a

siampipa in khialhna hanga biakna dingin khat pia-in, meihal biakna dingin a khat pia ding a, ama-a' dingin kilemna bawlsak ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh misi luang hangin amah khial hi. Amah in tua ni mahin a lutang apphakik ding a

a tuam om ding hun sungteng Topa-a' dingin amah tuam omin, mawhna hanga biakna dingin kum khat a pha tuuno a pa khat paipih ding hi. Ahih hangin ama tuam omna kininsak khin ahih manin a masa hun pen a mawkna hi ding hi
“A tuam om hun a cin' ciangin zuih ding Nazir ngeinate: Kikhopna buk kongah amah kipaipih ding a

amah in Topa' tungah letsong ahi meihal biakna dingin kum khat a pha a sitbaanglo tuuno a pa khat, khialhna hanga biakna dingin kum khat a pha a sitbaanglo tuuno a nu khat, leh thunuama biakna dingin a sitbaanglo tuutal khat
leh silngo sawhloh anlum lawh khat, sathau tawh a kibawl annel mohte, leh silngo sawhloh, sathau tawh a kizut mohphengte, leh an tawh a biaknate leh leenggahzu tawh a biaknate paipih ding hi
“Siampipa in Topa' mai-ah tuate paipihin a khialhna hanga biakna leh a meihal biakna pia ding a
a tuutal pen Topa' tungah thunuama biakna-in silngo sawhloh anlum lawh tawh piakhawm ding a, an tawh a biakna leh leenggahzu tawh a biakna zong siampipa in pia ding hi
Tua Nazir mipa in a ki-ap a sam, kikhopna bukkongah met ding a, a ki-ap ama lutang panin a samte la-in thunuama biakpiakna nuai-ah a om mei sungah hal ding hi

“Siampipa in a kihuansa tuutal liang, leh lawh sung panin silngo sawhloh moh khat, leh silngo sawhloh mohpheng khat la-in, a ki-ap hun sunga a sam a met khit ciangin tua Nazir mipa' khutah tuate koih ding a

Topa' mai-ah vei-a biakna dingin siampipa in tuate vei ding hi. Tuate pen a kivei a sa-iik leh a kipia a phei tawh siampipa-a' dingin a siangtho ama tanh ahi hi. Tua khit ciangin Nazir mipa in leenggahzu ne thei ding hi

“Hih pen kiciamna a la Nazir mipa-a' dingin ngeina ahi hi. Ama piakzawh zahzah a piak banah, Topa' tungah ama piakna pen Nazir hihna tawh a kiciamna bang hi ding a, ama kiciamna mah bangin amah in Nazir hihna tawh tuam omna ding ngeina zui-in a gamta ding hi,” a ci hi.
Topa in Moses kiangah
“Aaron leh a tapate tungah hih bangin gen in: Note in hih bangin Israel mite thupha na pia ding uh hi. Amaute tungah hih bangin na ci ding uh hi
‘ Topa in note thupha hong pia-in hong kem ta hen
Topa in note tungah a maitang hong taangsakin note hong ompih ta hen
Topa in note tungah a maipha hong pia hen la, note tungah nopsakna hong pia ta hen,’ ci-in thupha pia uh hen
“Amaute in tua bangin Israel mite tungah keima min lo ding uh a, keimah in amaute thupha ka pia ding hi,” a ci hi.
